title: Harness Engineering Is AI’s New Gold Rush
summary: Harness engineering is an emerging approach to AI development that focuses on building reliable systems around models through tools, memory, context, permissions, verification, and feedback loops. Unlike prompt engineering, it treats the infrastructure surrounding an AI agent as the primary source of value and competitive advantage.
